hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\.local|\.env\.[a-z]+|service.account.*\.json|credentials.*\.json)$'; then echo "BLOCKED: refusing to edit secrets file: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$' && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
